arts.sum: According to L’Équipe, a meeting on Friday took place ahead of the match between France and Israel set to be played in the French capital in November. The Stade de France…

arts.ttl: Spalletti and Inzaghi reconcile after Ultras comment controversy
arts.sum: Italy national team coach Luciano Spalletti and Inter Milan manager Simone Inzaghi have resolved their recent misunderstanding following Spalletti’s comments about the ongoing ultras investigation. The two coaches spoke over the phone to clear the air and maintain their professional relationship. Calciomercato detail how the controversy arose when Spalletti, before Italy’s Nations League match against Belgium, commented on the investigation involving Inzaghi and his interactions with Inter ultras. Spalletti had remarked that he had never experienced such situations in his career, adding that while he answers all calls, he knows when to hang up or continue conversations.
